title: Cleaning Up a Hacked WordPress Site: A Practical Recovery Process
excerpt: Recovering a compromised WordPress site is rarely about deleting a few malicious files. Effective recovery depends on preserving evidence, understanding persistence, and building repeatable cleanup processes.
body: Compromised WordPress sites rarely announce themselves dramatically.
More often they appear as small inconsistencies.
The instinct is often to delete everything immediately.
Preserve evidence before beginning remediation whenever possible.
